recap: Removed ralph.json lock check and ralph-state init call from ralph-start; deleted corresponding bats tests.
Created __lib/ralph-single.zsh with semaphore check, lock lifecycle, and claude invocation; added ralph-single.bats with 7 passing tests.
Created __lib/ralph-loop.zsh with sentinel watcher and N-iteration loop; migrated all 4 passing loop tests from ralph.bats to ralph-loop.bats.
